text:
miwi        2006-12-09 11:40:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns/checkdns         Makefile pkg-plist 
    dns/checkdns/files   patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  - Save user's checkdns.conf and install checkdns.conf-dist.
  - Respect NOPORTDOCS and install docs to DOCSDIR.
  
  - Install missing checkdns.css.
  - Don't install uninstall.sh.
  
  PR:             ports/105364
  Submitted by:   TAOKA Fumiyoshi <fmysh@iijmio-mail.jp>
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
                  xride (is holder of this pr)
